root_text.an5.213:1.3: Idha, bhikkhave, dussīlo sīlavipanno pamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahatiṁ bhogajāniṁ nigacchati.
root_text.an5.213:1.4: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:2.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, dussīlassa sīlavipannassa pāpako kittisaddo abbhuggacchati.
root_text.an5.213:2.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, dussīlo sīlavipanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati—yadi khattiyaparisaṁ, yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ, yadi gahapatiparisaṁ, yadi samaṇaparisaṁ—avisārado upasaṅkamati maṅkubhūto.
root_text.an5.213:3.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, tatiyo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:4.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, dussīlo sīlavipanno sammūḷho kālaṁ karoti.
root_text.an5.213:4.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, catuttho ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:5.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, dussīlo sīlavipanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an5.213:5.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, pañcamo ādīnavo dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:5.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā dussīlassa sīlavipattiyā.
root_text.an5.213:6.3: Idha, bhikkhave, sīlavā sīlasampanno appamādādhikaraṇaṁ mahantaṁ bhogakkhandhaṁ adhigacchati.
root_text.an5.213:6.4: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, paṭhamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya.
root_text.an5.213:7.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavato sīlasampannassa kalyāṇo kittisaddo abbhuggacchati.
root_text.an5.213:7.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dutiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya.
root_text.an5.213:8.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavā sīlasampanno yaññadeva parisaṁ upasaṅkamati—yadi khattiyaparisaṁ, yadi brāhmaṇaparisaṁ, yadi gahapatiparisaṁ, yadi samaṇaparisaṁ—visārado upasaṅkamati amaṅkubhūto.
root_text.an5.213:8.2: Ayaṁ bhikkhave, tatiyo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya.
root_text.an5.213:9.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavā sīlasampanno asammūḷho kālaṁ karoti.
root_text.an5.213:9.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, catuttho ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya.
root_text.an5.213:10.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, sīlavā sīlasampanno kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā sugatiṁ saggaṁ lokaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.an5.213:10.2: Ayaṁ, bhikkhave, pañcamo ānisaṁso sīlavato sīlasampadāya.
root_text.an5.213:10.3: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ānisaṁsā sīlavato sīlasampadāyā”ti.

translation_text.an5.213:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks for an unethical person because of their failure in ethics.
translation_text.an5.213:1.3: Firstly, an unethical person loses great wealth on account of negligence.
translation_text.an5.213:2.1: Furthermore, an unethical person gets a bad reputation.
translation_text.an5.213:3.1: Furthermore, an unethical person enters any kind of assembly timid and embarrassed, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics.
translation_text.an5.213:4.1: Furthermore, an unethical person feels lost when they die.
translation_text.an5.213:5.1: Furthermore, an unethical person, when their body breaks up, after death, is reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.an5.213:5.3: These are the five drawbacks for an unethical person because of their failure in ethics.
translation_text.an5.213:6.1: There are these five benefits for an ethical person because of their accomplishment in ethics.
translation_text.an5.213:6.3: Firstly, an ethical person gains great wealth on account of diligence.
translation_text.an5.213:7.1: Furthermore, an ethical person gets a good reputation.
translation_text.an5.213:8.1: Furthermore, an ethical person enters any kind of assembly bold and self-assured, whether it’s an assembly of aristocrats, brahmins, householders, or ascetics.
translation_text.an5.213:9.1: Furthermore, an ethical person dies not feeling lost.
translation_text.an5.213:10.1: Furthermore, when an ethical person’s body breaks up, after death, they’re reborn in a good place, a heavenly realm.
translation_text.an5.213:10.3: These are the five benefits for an ethical person because of their accomplishment in ethics.”
